data.body:
=== ROUND 4: decompose epic + review epic & children + DSO full-suite + overlay triggering + signal-loss + re-tune ===

DECOMPOSED epic 5fd2 into 9 child stories (registry→{layer1,layer2,overlays,chunking}; layer2→{overlays,docs};
attestation→claim→docs) with ACs that pass our gates. Then ran the FULL suite (~110 LLM runs) per default
protocol on the epic+children + a varied 12-ticket DSO sample (epics incl. one WITHOUT brainstorm:complete,
stories, tasks, bugs), validated overlay triggering, added the EXP criterion, and diagnosed our leanness vs DSO.
Writeup: docs/experiments/plan-review-decomposition-overlays-retune.md; data under docs/experiments/data/.

A) EPIC+CHILDREN: epic clean (G5 RESOLVED now it has children); but child STORIES drew 7-10 mostly-MAJOR
   findings — gate applied full LEAF scrutiny (E6 proving-commands, leaf overlays) to mid-level stories. Central
   tuning signal.
B) DSO SAMPLE: EXP criterion correct (suppressed on bc47 pilot + mechanical work; fired only on 1414's underived
   batch=20). Bugs drew 6-7 planning-findings -> confirms bug-exemption. E5/E6/F4/overlays over-fire on
   mechanical/test tasks (TYPE mismatch).
C) OVERLAY TRIGGERING validated: T1/T5a/T5d DETERMINISTIC (12-13/13 agree, ~0 FP); T8/T6/T5b/T5c/T9 LLM-ROUTED
   (T8 keyword-matches 9/13 but only 3 relevant). Encoded in registry trigger field.
D) SIGNAL-LOSS: NOT losing signal. b575: DSO 12, our single-turn 7, but our T8 agentic structural-gap probe
   RECOVERED 5 of DSO's 6 bot-psychologist gaps (same enum-vocab-mismatch class). DSO's e7f3 extra volume was
   forced 3->5 scoring our anti-FP posture correctly drops. Only signal-loss risk = under-triggering T8, fixed by
   the router firing T8 on LLM/agent-design plans.

RE-TUNE (implemented + RE-RUN to validate): proportionate scrutiny by LEVEL (epic/story/task) + TYPE (bug-exempt;
E5-suppress on test tasks; F4 N/A internal leaf) via an `applies_at` criterion field. Re-run: children 7-10 -> 3-8
findings, concentrated on REAL ones (E2 ambiguities, E5 testing-strategy, G5 decompose-into-tasks, EXP unvalidated,
T5e arch); leaf-noise gone. CRITERIA CONTENT is well-calibrated; fix is ROUTING + the one new EXP criterion.

CHANGES: epic design updated (proportionate-scrutiny-by-level/type bullet + overlay deterministic/LLM split + EXP
in the Layer-2 AC); experimental results posted as a comment on epic 5fd2; overlays child encodes the validated
trigger split + T8-must-fire; layer2 child encodes EXP + applies_at routing. The review process now incorporates
generic empirical-validation coaching (EXP) that does NOT fire when experimentation is already present. All epic +
children still pass check_ac + clarity.

NEXT: implement per the children (registry first); file F1-F12; optional second-round validation of the EXP
threshold-sensitivity (1414 borderline) and a wider deterministic-trigger precision measurement.
